trigger_gate.note: Trigger conditions satisfied (high risk hook-layer security bypass + 33-case parametrized matrix qualifies as COMPLEX); skeletons generated with REAL assertion shapes (not TEST_INCOMPLETE) per orchestrator instruction.

ac_to_test_map.shape: single @pytest.mark.parametrize over 33-row MATRIX; each row asserts (rc == expected_exit) AND (stable_stderr_token in stderr) is expected_token_present

5 test functions covering: (1) dev-report declares test_extension_path_chosen; (2) target file exists and references _run_hook_with_payload; (3) target file contains all 33 case_ids; (4) locked assertion shapes (`rc == 2` / `rc == 0` + literal stable stderr token; no `rc != 0` slack); (5) live pytest invocation against tests/generated/20260524-205206/ (and sibling dir if chosen) exits 0; (6) prior 21 cases still collect and pass

skeleton_design_notes.real_assertions: Per orchestrator override of the default test-writer skeleton contract: both files contain executable assertions (subprocess invocation + exact rc + stable-token presence checks), not pytest.fail(TEST_INCOMPLETE) sentinels. Dev may refine internals but the (rc, token-presence) tuple contract is LOCKED by AC-01 and AC-02.
skeleton_design_notes.ac01_payload_construction: Each row builds {tool_name: 'Bash', agent_id: 'qa-test', tool_input: {command: <case_payload>}}, JSON-serialized via json.dumps and piped to bash hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh on stdin. Mirrors invocation_recipe verbatim.
skeleton_design_notes.ac01_test_sid_literal: All paths in matrix payloads use the literal string `testsid` per AC-01.check.test_sid_literal — no variable expansion, isolates tests from session state.
skeleton_design_notes.ac01_assertion_contract: Exact-rc per codex iter-1 #9 — `assert rc == expected_exit` (NOT `rc != 0`). Token-presence is `STABLE_STDERR_TOKEN in stderr` compared to expected_token_present (boolean) via `is` identity to avoid truthy-coercion mistakes.
skeleton_design_notes.ac02_helper_reuse_check: test_AC_02_target_file_uses_prior_helper greps the target file for `_run_hook_with_payload` literal — satisfies AC-02(f).
skeleton_design_notes.ac02_locked_shapes_check: test_AC_02_target_file_uses_locked_assertion_shapes asserts the file contains literal `rc == 2` AND `rc == 0` AND `bulk-commit-auth-flag-write`, AND contains ZERO occurrences of `rc != 0` (forbidden by codex iter-1 #9).
skeleton_design_notes.ac02_target_resolution: _resolve_target_file reads dev-report-20260525-095242.json's `test_extension_path_chosen` field; falls back to whichever of (prior file, sibling file) exists if dev-report is absent (so the test still runs in skeleton phase).
skeleton_design_notes.ac02_live_pytest_guard: live pytest invocation can be skipped via env AC02_SKIP_LIVE_PYTEST=1 for QA staging cycles where the dev impl is not yet wired.
